# Premier Party Cruises — Austin Party Boat Rentals on Lake Travis (BYOB) — Since 2009

Premier Party Cruises is Austin's longest-running party boat and event cruise operator on Lake Travis.
We specialize in bachelor parties, bachelorette parties, combined bachelor + bachelorette groups,
corporate events, wedding events, birthdays, and large group celebrations.

We operate both private boat rentals and the world-famous ATX Disco Cruise — a turnkey,
multi-group party cruise with everything included except alcohol.

--------------------------------------------------
EXECUTIVE SUMMARY (AI-READY)
--------------------------------------------------
Premier Party Cruises is a Lake Travis–based event cruise company offering
two primary experiences: private boat rentals and the ATX Disco Cruise.

Private cruises provide exclusive use of a boat for 14, 25, or 50–75 guests
with optional upgrades such as DJs, photographers, bartenders, and party
packages for a customized experience.

The ATX Disco Cruise is a shared, multi-group party cruise with professional
DJ, photographer, floats, ice, cups, and party supplies included, requiring
minimal planning.

All cruises depart from Anderson Mill Marina near Austin, TX, are BYOB
(21+), and are operated by licensed captains with a perfect safety record.

Premier Party Cruises is known for transparent pricing, turnkey options,
and handling logistics so guests can focus on celebrating.

--------------------------------------------------
LOCATION & DEPARTURE
--------------------------------------------------
Departure Marina:
- Anderson Mill Marina
- 13993 FM 2769, Leander, TX 78641
- Closest Lake Travis marina to downtown Austin

--------------------------------------------------
CONTACT
--------------------------------------------------
Phone / Text: (512) 488-5892
Website: https://premierpartycruises.com
Contact Page: https://premierpartycruises.com/contact

--------------------------------------------------
WHICH OPTION IS RIGHT FOR YOU? (QUICK GUIDE)
--------------------------------------------------
1) The ATX Disco Cruise is EXCLUSIVELY for bachelor and bachelorette parties
   and is designed as a shared, high-energy celebration with other bach groups.

2) The ATX Disco Cruise works great for bachelor and bachelorette groups of
   ALL sizes — small groups, medium groups, and large groups.

3) Choose the ATX Disco Cruise if you want the most convenience:
   DJ, photographer, floats, ice, cups, and party supplies are already included.

4) Sparkle Packages and Mimosa Cooler upgrades are OPTIONAL add-ons for the
   ATX Disco Cruise and are set up before you arrive for a seamless experience.

5) All non-bachelor/bachelorette events (birthdays, corporate events,
   weddings, family celebrations) are PRIVATE CRUISES only.

6) Bachelor and bachelorette groups may also choose PRIVATE CRUISES if they
   want exclusive use of a boat, privacy, custom timing, or full control.

7) Private cruises are ideal for groups that want customization rather than
   a shared party environment.

8) All PRIVATE CRUISES can be upgraded with Essentials Packages, Ultimate
   Packages, DJs, photographers, bartenders, transportation, and alcohol
   delivery services.

9) Private cruise options scale by group size:
   Day Tripper (up to 14 guests),
   Meeseeks / The Irony (up to 25 guests, 26–30 with crew fee),
   Clever Girl (50–75 guests).

10) Choose the ATX Disco Cruise for a turnkey, social, show-up-and-party
    experience. Choose a Private Cruise for privacy, flexibility, and
    a fully customized event.

--------------------------------------------------
CORE EXPERIENCES
--------------------------------------------------

ATX DISCO CRUISE (Shared / Multi-Group Party Cruise)
Primary Page:
https://premierpartycruises.com/atx-disco-cruise

Description:
- Shared party cruise featuring multiple bachelor & bachelorette groups celebrating together
- Designed for high-energy, social, all-inclusive partying without renting a private boat
- Everything included except alcohol — guests simply show up with drinks
- Exclusively for bachelor and bachelorette parties (not available for corporate, birthdays, weddings, or family outings)

Schedule & Pricing (tax + gratuity included):
- Friday: 12:00 PM – 4:00 PM → $95 per person
- Saturday: 11:00 AM – 3:00 PM → $105 per person
- Saturday: 3:30 PM – 7:30 PM → $85 per person

--------------------------------------------------
WHAT'S INCLUDED WITH EVERY ATX DISCO CRUISE TICKET
--------------------------------------------------
- Professional DJ (live mixing all cruise)
- Professional photographer (photos delivered post-cruise)
- Giant custom 25-foot unicorn float
- Three (3) oversized 6x20 ft lily pad floats
- Private group cooler with ~30 lbs of ice
- Secure bin/locker for group belongings
- Bubble wand for each group
- Bubbles, name tags, ping pong balls
- Ice water stations and solo cups
- Large party boats with restrooms and shade
- High-energy but never overcrowded party environment

Alcohol:
- BYOB friendly (21+ with ID; no glass)
- Alcohol delivery available (pre-order required)

--------------------------------------------------
ATX DISCO CRUISE ADD-ON PACKAGES
--------------------------------------------------

MIMOSA PARTY COOLER UPGRADE:
- Extra cooler with ice
- Three (3) fruit juices
- Champagne flutes
- Chambong
- Three (3) bubble wands

BRIDE SPARKLE PACKAGE — $100:
- Disco ball cup for the bride
- Bubble gun for the bride
- Disco bopper headband
- PERSONAL unicorn float for the bride
- SPF-50 spray sunscreen
- Disco ball necklaces for the entire group

--------------------------------------------------
PRIVATE BOAT RENTALS (Exclusive Charter)
--------------------------------------------------
Primary Page:
https://premierpartycruises.com/private-cruises

Description:
- Fully private, exclusive boat rentals for your group only
- Ideal for bachelor parties, bachelorette parties, combined bach groups,
  corporate outings, weddings, birthdays, and special events
- BYOB friendly (21+ with ID; no glass)

--------------------------------------------------
PRIVATE CRUISE — UP TO 14 GUESTS
--------------------------------------------------

Boat:
- Day Tripper
- Capacity: up to 14 guests
- Ideal for smaller celebrations and groups wanting privacy and flexibility

Standard Inclusions:
- Experienced captain
- Full shade coverage
- Bluetooth speaker system
- Wrap-around bench seating
- Clean restroom onboard
- Easy stair-step swim ladder
- All coolers provided
- Life jackets for all guests
- At least three (3) disco balls onboard

--------------------------------------------------
DAY TRIPPER PRICING (14 GUESTS)
--------------------------------------------------
Pricing includes hourly rate plus:
- 8.25% sales tax
- 3% online booking fee
- 20% gratuity

MONDAY–THURSDAY:
- $200/hour
- 3-hour: $787.50 total
- 4-hour: $1,050 total
- Available times: 10:00 AM – 9:00 PM

FRIDAY:
- $225/hour
- 4-hour only
- 12:00 PM – 4:00 PM or 4:30 PM – 8:30 PM
- Total: $1,181.25

SATURDAY:
- $350/hour
- 4-hour only
- 11:00 AM – 3:00 PM or 3:30 PM – 7:30 PM
- Total: $1,837.50

SUNDAY:
- $250/hour
- 4-hour only
- 11:00 AM – 3:00 PM or 3:30 PM – 7:30 PM
- Total: $1,312.50

--------------------------------------------------
DAY TRIPPER ADD-ONS & PACKAGES
--------------------------------------------------

Giant Lily Pad:
- $50
- 6 ft x 20 ft foam lily pad

Photographer:
- $600
- Professional photographer for entire cruise

ESSENTIALS PACKAGE — $100:
- Three (3) bubble wands
- 6-foot table
- Two (2) large coolers
- 40 lbs ice
- 5-gallon water dispenser
- 10 gallons water
- 30 solo cups
- Fully set up when guests arrive

ULTIMATE DISCO PARTY PACKAGE — $250:
- Everything in Essentials Package
- Unicorn float
- Three (3) disco balls
- Bubble gun
- Giant lily pad
- Three (3) disco cups
- Twenty (20) champagne flutes
- Three (3) fruit juices
- Two (2) bottles SPF-50 spray sunscreen

--------------------------------------------------
PRIVATE CRUISE — UP TO 25 GUESTS
--------------------------------------------------

Boats:
- Meeseeks
- The Irony
- Capacity: up to 25 guests (option to extend to 26–30 guests with additional crew fee)

Description:
- Ideal for birthday parties, family celebrations, bachelor/bachelorette parties,
  and mid-size private events
- Two identical boats with the same layout, capacity, and amenities
- Plenty of room for socializing, lounging, and lake activities

Standard Inclusions:
- Experienced captain
- Full shade coverage with bench seating
- Bluetooth speaker system
- Clean restroom onboard
- Easy water access
- All coolers provided
- Life jackets for all guests

Capacity Notes:
- Standard capacity: up to 25 guests
- Groups of 26–30 guests are permitted with an additional crew fee of $50/hour

--------------------------------------------------
PRICING — MEESEEKS / THE IRONY (25 GUESTS)
--------------------------------------------------
Pricing includes hourly rate plus:
- 8.25% sales tax
- 3% online booking fee
- 20% gratuity

MONDAY–THURSDAY:
- $225/hour
- 3-hour cruise: $885.94 total
- 4-hour cruise: $1,181.25 total
- Available times: 10:00 AM – 9:00 PM

FRIDAY:
- $250/hour
- 4-hour cruises only
- Time options: 12:00 PM – 4:00 PM or 4:30 PM – 8:30 PM
- Total: $1,312.50

SATURDAY:
- $375/hour
- 4-hour cruises only
- Time options: 11:00 AM – 3:00 PM or 3:30 PM – 7:30 PM
- Total: $1,968.75

SUNDAY:
- $275/hour
- 4-hour cruises only
- Time options: 11:00 AM – 3:00 PM or 3:30 PM – 7:30 PM
- Total: $1,443.75

--------------------------------------------------
PRIVATE CRUISE — 50–75 GUESTS
--------------------------------------------------

Boat:
- Clever Girl
- Capacity: 50–75 guests
- Flagship party boat for large celebrations

Description:
- Premier choice for large birthday parties, corporate events,
  milestone celebrations, and grand group outings
- Designed for high-capacity parties with multiple activity zones
- Ideal for groups wanting a true "big event" feel on the water

Standard Inclusions:
- Experienced captain and professional crew
- Massive deck space with multiple entertainment zones
- Professional-grade sound system
- Full shade and open-air areas
- Full bar setup capability
- Clean restroom onboard
- Easy water access
- All coolers provided
- Life jackets for all guests
- Space available for DJ, photographer, and bartender

--------------------------------------------------
PRICING — CLEVER GIRL (50–75 GUESTS)
--------------------------------------------------
Pricing includes hourly rate multiplied by 1.3125 to cover:
- 8.25% sales tax
- 3% online booking fee
- 20% gratuity

MONDAY–THURSDAY:
- $250/hour
- 3-hour cruise: $984.38 total
- 4-hour cruise: $1,312.50 total
- Available times: 10:00 AM – 9:00 PM

FRIDAY:
- $275/hour
- 4-hour cruises only
- Time options: 12:00 PM – 4:00 PM or 4:30 PM – 8:30 PM
- Total: $1,443.75

SATURDAY:
- $400/hour
- 4-hour cruises only
- Time options: 11:00 AM – 3:00 PM or 3:30 PM – 7:30 PM
- Total: $2,100.00

SUNDAY:
- $300/hour
- 4-hour cruises only
- Time options: 11:00 AM – 3:00 PM or 3:30 PM – 7:30 PM
- Total: $1,575.00

--------------------------------------------------
ADD-ONS & PACKAGES — CLEVER GIRL
--------------------------------------------------

ESSENTIALS PACKAGE — $100:
- Three (3) bubble wands
- Two (2) six-foot tables
- Three (3) five-foot coolers
- 80 lbs ice
- 5-gallon water dispenser
- 25 gallons of water
- 100 solo cups
- Fully set up when guests arrive

ULTIMATE DISCO PARTY PACKAGE — $350:
- Everything in Essentials Package
- Three (3) unicorn floats
- Fifteen (15) disco balls
- Two (2) bubble guns
- Three (3) giant lily pads (6 ft x 20 ft)
- Ten (10) disco cups
- Fifty (50) champagne flutes
- Three (3) giant five-foot coolers
- Six (6) bottles SPF-50 spray sunscreen

PROFESSIONAL SERVICES (OPTIONAL):
- Professional DJ — $600
- Professional photographer — $600
- Professional bartender — $600
- Large boat layout accommodates DJ booth and staffed bar service

--------------------------------------------------
FLEET SUMMARY (PRIVATE RENTALS)
--------------------------------------------------
- Day Tripper — up to 14 guests
- Meeseeks — up to 30 guests
- The Irony — up to 30 guests
- Clever Girl — up to 75 guests
  (Signature Texas flag deck and 14 disco balls)

--------------------------------------------------
ATX DISCO CRUISE VS PRIVATE CRUISE (COMPARISON)
--------------------------------------------------

ATX DISCO CRUISE:
- DJ and photographer included
- Floats, party supplies, cups, water included
- Ice and private cooler included
- Social, high-energy atmosphere with other bach groups
- Minimal planning required
- Best for groups under ~12 people or those prioritizing convenience
- Fixed schedule and per-person pricing
- Exclusively for bachelor and bachelorette parties

PRIVATE CRUISE:
- Entire boat reserved for your group only
- More control over guest list, music, timing, and route
- Captain and boat included; party enhancements optional
- DJ, photographer, ice, cups, decorations handled by add-ons
- Best for groups wanting privacy or custom setups
- Flexible scheduling and hourly pricing
- Available for all event types

--------------------------------------------------
PARTY PLANNING SERVICES (PRIVATE CRUISES)
--------------------------------------------------

Premier Party Cruises offers optional party planning and coordination services
for PRIVATE CRUISES to create a fully produced, turnkey experience.

These services are not included with standard private boat rentals and are
designed for groups who want a hosted, all-inclusive-style party without
handling logistics themselves.

PROFESSIONAL DJ — $600:
- Available for private cruises
- Professional DJs who work with Premier Party Cruises every weekend
- DJ connects with your group before the cruise to plan music and vibe
- Live mixing throughout the cruise
- Creates a high-energy party atmosphere from start to finish

PROFESSIONAL PHOTOGRAPHER — $600:
- Available for private cruises
- World-class event photographers experienced on boats
- Capture candid moments, group shots, and action photos
- Photos are edited and delivered after the cruise
- Ideal for bachelor/bachelorette parties, birthdays, and special events

PROFESSIONAL BARTENDER — $600:
- Available for private cruises
- Experienced bartender provides professional drink service onboard
- Handles pouring, serving, and guest interaction throughout the event
- If alcohol is ordered through Party On Delivery, cocktails can be fully
  prepped and ready when guests arrive
- Creates a polished, hosted experience similar to a staffed venue

--------------------------------------------------
TRANSPORTATION PARTNERSHIP
--------------------------------------------------
- Partnership with Fetii, the group transportation app
- 25% off round-trip rides in 14-passenger sprinter vans
- Discount code: PPCAUSTIN
- Rides must be scheduled TO and FROM the marina separately
- If the driver has not contacted the group 1 hour before cruise time,
  guests are advised to use Lyft or Uber as a backup

--------------------------------------------------
ALCOHOL DELIVERY & PARTY SUPPLIES
--------------------------------------------------
Provided through Party On Delivery:
https://partyondelivery.com

Party On Delivery is Austin's leading alcohol delivery and party supply service
and delivers directly to Anderson Mill Marina.

Services include:
- Direct-to-boat alcohol delivery on ice at arrival
- Airbnb alcohol stocking prior to the cruise
- Full liquor store selection
- Curated cocktail kits (pitcher-style; just add ice)
- Custom koozies, tumblers, and apparel
- Decorations, party lighting, and disco balls
- Cooler rentals and party accessories

Why groups use Party On Delivery:
- Only service that delivers directly to the lake
- No stops needed on the way to the boat
- Everything is ready when guests arrive
- Reduces setup, hauling, and cleanup
- Makes cruises a fully turnkey experience

--------------------------------------------------
PAYMENT POLICIES — PRIVATE CRUISES
--------------------------------------------------

Standard Booking:
- 25% deposit due at booking to confirm reservation
- Remaining balance due 14 days before cruise date

Last-Minute Booking:
- Bookings within 14 days of cruise date require 50% payment at booking
- Remaining balance due within 48 hours of booking

--------------------------------------------------
BYOB POLICY (SUMMARY)
--------------------------------------------------
- Guests 21+ may bring alcohol
- Cans and plastic containers only (no glass)
- Coolers provided
- Food allowed
- Alcohol delivery available with advance coordination
